'''wasoho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:draftsman|draftsman]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-s-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:draftsman|draftsman]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| wasoho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:wæseheth|wæseheth]] || [[word:wæsehej|wæsehej]] || [[word:wæsehesh|wæsehesh]] || [[word:wæsehe|wæsehe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:wasosohoth|wasosohoth]] || [[word:wasosohoj|wasosohoj]] || [[word:wasosohosh|wasosohosh]] || [[word:wasosoho|wasosoho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:wasohoth|wasohoth]] || [[word:wasohoj|wasohoj]] || [[word:wasohosh|wasohosh]] || [[word:wasoho|wasoho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:wasofhoth|wasofhoth]] || [[word:wasofhoj|wasofhoj]] || [[word:wasofhosh|wasofhosh]] || [[word:wasofhof|wasofhof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:wasohotho|wasohotho]] || [[word:wasohojo|wasohojo]] || [[word:wasohosho|wasohosho]] || [[word:wasohoko|wasohoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:wasohoth|wasohoth]] || [[word:wasohoj|wasohoj]] || [[word:wasohosh|wasohosh]] || [[word:wasoho|wasoho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:wasohothol|wasohothol]] || [[word:wasohojol|wasohojol]] || [[word:wasohoshol|wasohoshol]] || [[word:wasohokol|wasohokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:wasohothotho|wasohothotho]] || [[word:wasohojojo|wasohojojo]] || [[word:wasohoshosho|wasohoshosho]] || [[word:wasohoko|wasohoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:wasohothon|wasohothon]] || [[word:wasohojon|wasohojon]] || [[word:wasohoshon|wasohoshon]] || [[word:wasohokon|wasohokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:wasohothoro|wasohothoro]] || [[word:wasohojoro|wasohojoro]] || [[word:wasohoshoro|wasohoshoro]] || [[word:wasohokoro|wasohokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|3a936e1}}
